activities.title: Emit Cache-Affecting Dimensions
controls: 7+ wire-level dimensions, any one differing turn-over-turn can break cache
client cannot inspect backend's actual hashing algorithm
outputs: request body + headers carrying all cache-affecting bytes

activities.title: Compute Incremental-Input Delta (WS)
controls: request.input must be strict prefix-extension of (prior_input ++ items_added)
outputs: Option<Vec<ResponseItem>> incremental items OR None (fallback to full-mode)

activities.title: Detect Compaction Window Shift
inputs: compaction events (Ch09 endpoint result) OR Resumed history with RolloutItem::Compacted
outputs: client_metadata.x-codex-window-id value shift (WS) — cache namespace partition

activities.title: Stash Baseline For Next Turn
outputs: state ready for next turn's delta check

activities.title: Manage Known Cache Hazards
controls: GPT-5.5 server-side regression (openai/codex#20301) acknowledged; not the full explanation for client-controllable differentials
mid-session identity dimension change orphans cache lineage
outputs: maintained ledger; informs future RCA work
